The Residence

A first-floor residence raised above the gardens for a longer view across the bay. An open kitchen and living room flow onto a wide loggia, while a private bedroom sits quietly to the side — light, elevated and calm. Steps from the funicular, the private beach and the heart of the resort on Albania's southern coast.
